definition: Monthly CRSP stock return minus the Fama-French risk-free rate.
Log of one plus automation intensity, where automation intensity is PP&E per employee.
Net property, plant and equipment divided by number of employees.
Capital expenditure divided by total assets.
Research and development expense divided by total assets.
Book equity divided by market equity.
Operating income before depreciation divided by total assets or ROA from WRDS ratios where available.
Total liabilities divided by total assets or debt-to-assets from WRDS ratios where available.
Sales divided by number of employees.
Negative SG&A intensity, calculated as negative SG&A expense divided by sales.
Rolling 12-month standard deviation of monthly stock returns.
